name: Beloved Frangipani
original_name: เจ้าดอกลั่นทม
overview: The story follows Tharn, a woman healing from heartbreak, who unexpectedly finds comfort, connection and new emotions after meeting Anna during a solo trip. With a calm atmosphere, natural settings and emotionally driven storytelling, the series focuses on healing, intimacy and second chances.

trailers.title: TEASER ❘ GL Mini Series ❘ เจ้าดอกลั่นทม ( Beloved Frangipani )
